flashcards.back:
Semaphores: empty=N, full=0, mutex=1

Producer:
wait(empty), wait(mutex)
add to buffer
signal(mutex), signal(full)

Consumer:
wait(full), wait(mutex)
remove from buffer
signal(mutex), signal(empty)

Problem: All pick left chopstick → all wait for right

Solutions:
1. Asymmetric: Odd pick left, even pick right
2. Limit: Allow only 4 at table
3. Atomic: Pick both or none (with mutex)

All break circular wait condition

Variables: mutex, write_lock, read_count=0

Reader Entry:
lock(mutex), read_count++
if first reader: lock(write_lock)
unlock(mutex)

Reader Exit:
lock(mutex), read_count--
if last reader: unlock(write_lock)
unlock(mutex)

Writer: lock/unlock write_lock

Producer-Consumer: No starvation with correct solution

Dining Philosophers: Possible without fair scheduling

Readers-Writers:
• First solution: Writers starve
• Second solution: Readers starve
• Fair solution: Neither starves
